rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF BONNIE R. MCELFRESH
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Granting Conservator Of Estate The Independent Powers To Borrow Money And To Give Security For Repayment Of Loan, And To Increase Conservatorship Bond
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance will be required. The Court will determine on the petition and may inquire into the following information at the hearing: (1) Amortization schedule for the loan program. (2) Whether an amended Letters is necessary. If so, the petition and proposed order should request its issuance. (3) Status of Inventory and Appraisal filing. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 3/18/26. Prior to review of the petition, all ancillary documents must be filed, including, but not limited to, Confidential Supplement to Duties and Liabilities, Notice of Petition to Administer Estate, Proof of Publication, and a proposed order (completed with the assumption that petition will be granted as requested). It is also noted that the petition and the Duties and Liablities are incomplete. All documents to be filed by 3/2/26.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LOLA L. COURTNEY
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 03/17/2026. Issue necessitating continuance: When second generation or more distant heirs are listed, the deceased ancestor(s) through whom they take (or would have taken) must be named, the relationship(s) to the decedent stated, and the date(s) of death specified (LRSF 14.18.C.3). Please address the above issue and delivery courtesy copies of all further filings to this examiner no later than 03/03/2026 to avoid additional continuance.
